title: Claude Fable 5 is Now BANNED?!
summary: Cole Medin discusses the removal of Claude Fable 5 shortly after launch, reportedly due to US government export-control directives and claimed security vulnerabilities. He reviews Fable 5's performance metrics against Claude Opus 4.8 and reflects on implications for developers building on frontier models.
writeup: Cole Medin covers the removal of Claude Fable 5 soon after its launch, attributed to US government export-control directives and reported security vulnerabilities. The video compares Fable 5's performance metrics against Claude Opus 4.8 and considers what a sudden ban means for developers who build on frontier models. Concepts touched include export control, jailbreaks, and model valuation.
